faqs.question: What is the JioGames Creator Network?
faqs.answer: JioGames Creator Network is a premier platform designed to bridge the gap between ambitious gaming creators and world-class brands for UGC campaigns and partnerships.

faqs.question: How do I qualify for the network?
faqs.answer: We look for creators who bring genuine passion, consistent quality, and a meaningful presence in the gaming community. It’s not about your numbers—it’s about your drive, creativity, and commitment. Every application is carefully reviewed by our team with that in mind.

faqs.question: Is this only for gaming creators?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Creator Network is launching as a gaming-first program.

faqs.question: Which platforms are eligible?
faqs.answer: All major platforms qualify, YouTube, Instagram, X, Twitch, Facebook, Reddit and Discord. If you consistently create gaming content on any platform, you can apply.

faqs.question: Is this a paid program?
faqs.answer: It’s free to apply and participate. The Creator Network is designed to support creators. Members gain access to monetisation opportunities and partnered benefits.

faqs.question: Can I join if I’m part of other creator programs?
faqs.answer: Yes. Being part of the Creator Network doesn’t restrict you from working with other platforms or programs. In rare cases where a campaign requires exclusivity, it will be clearly communicated in advance.

faqs.question: What happens if I’m not selected?
faqs.answer: Your application remains active. Some creators are not selected initially but are brought in later based on their growth and consistency. Continue creating and reapplying.

faqs.question: Does a referral improve my chances?
faqs.answer: Yes. A referral signals that an existing member believes you’re a strong fit. While it doesn’t guarantee selection, it is a meaningful factor in our evaluation.

creatorTypes.title: Esports

creatorTypes.title: Fan Creators
creatorTypes.description: Art, Cosplayers, UGC concepts, Community Builds.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit your details, platforms and format. We only ask what helps us activate your quickly.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: We score for quality, consistency and fit. Creators are bucketed for the right opportunities.

steps.title: Activate
steps.description: Selected creators receive briefs, assets and opportunities. As the Network grows, rewards expand.

steps.title: Scale
steps.description: We turn what works into a repeatable creator engines for JioGames.
